creator: eric@edombroski.com
text:
Thank you, I'll check it out this week.
-Eric


On Sun, Oct 7, 2012 at 2:49 PM, Garrett Cooper <yanegomi@gmail.com> wrote:

>     FreeNAS 7/8 has a shadow_copy2 patch which may make things work
> for you on samba 3.6; it was originally developed by Daisuke Aoyama
> (now affiliated with the Nas4Free project) and ported over to FreeNAS
> 8 by delphij@. The patch procedure is as follows:
>
> 1. Fetch the patch (
>
> http://freenas.svn.sourceforge.net/viewvc/freenas/trunk/patches/ports-samba36-001.patch?revision=12082
> ).
> 2. cd /usr/ports
> 3. Verify that the patch will go through:
>     patch -C < /path/to/samba36-001.patch
> 4. Patch the sucker:
>     patch < /path/to/samba36-001.patch
> 5. Run make clean all deinstall install like you may do normally.
>
>     Voila! You might have to do some config file fudging, but
> hopefully not much..
> Cheers!
> -Garrett
>
